args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerIdClean,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE))) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS opp_count
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerIdClean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerIdClean,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS DATE))) AS avg_days,
       COUNT(*) AS opp_count
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01'
  AND CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01'
  AND TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerIdClean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 10;
